page_content: THET659 Graduate Design Studio - Lighting (3 Credits) We will focus on connecting subject matter to light. Questions of meaning, structure, process, and intent will be investigated. The class will also explore the qualities and functions of light, what light can and cannot communicate. Students will develop a visual and conceptual vocabulary. Emphasis will be placed on process, both intellectual and practical. Jointly offered with: THET477. Restriction: Must not have completed THET477; and permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department. Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs. Credit Only Granted for: THET477 or THET659.
